user.title: Set Up Ezlo Cloud HARC
user.description: This integration enables secure remote access to your Home Assistant instance via Ezlo Cloud HARC.

login.title: Log in to Ezlo Cloud HARC
login.description:
Enter your Ezlo Cloud HARC credentials to enable remote access.

{error_detail}

signup.title: Create an Ezlo Cloud HARC Account
signup.description:
Create a new account to start a **free trial** of Ezlo Cloud HARC remote access.

{error_detail}

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Ezlo Cloud HARC
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Ezlo Cloud HARC session has expired. Enter your credentials to restore remote access.

{error_detail}

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Ezlo Cloud HARC
reconfigure.description:
Update the credentials used to connect to Ezlo Cloud HARC.

{error_detail}

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid username or password. Please try again.
error.device_already_bound: This Home Assistant installation is already linked to a different Ezlo Cloud HARC account. Sign out from the other account, or contact support to release the binding.
error.signup_failed: Account creation failed. Please try again.
error.network_error: Unable to reach Ezlo Cloud HARC. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

advanced.title: Advanced — API endpoint
advanced.description:
Override the Ezlo Cloud HARC API endpoint.

Current: `{current_api_uri}`
Default: `{default_api_uri}`

Clear the field to revert to the default.

subscribe.title: Complete Your Subscription
subscribe.description:
Click the link below to complete checkout in your browser:

[Proceed to checkout]({url})

Your free trial begins immediately after checkout. This page will update automatically once Stripe confirms the payment method.

If this page does not update after a few moments, you can close this dialog and reopen the integration options.

redirecting.title: Complete Payment
redirecting.description:
Click the link below to complete your subscription payment:

[Proceed to payment]({url})

This page will update automatically once payment is confirmed.

abort.logged_out: You have been logged out of Ezlo Cloud HARC. Remote access has been disabled.
abort.stripe_redirect_finished: Checkout flow completed. Your subscription status will update shortly.
abort.stripe_failed: Could not start the checkout flow. Please try again later.
abort.config_unavailable: Could not reach the Ezlo Cloud HARC to load checkout configuration. Please try again later.

abort.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
abort.advanced_disabled: Advanced options are not enabled for this account.

restart_required_for_trusted_proxies.title: Add the trusted_proxies block to configuration.yaml
restart_required_for_trusted_proxies.description:
Ezlo Cloud HARC needs the Home Assistant HTTP component to trust the local frpc reverse proxy. Add the following block to your `configuration.yaml` and restart Home Assistant:

```yaml
http:
  use_x_forwarded_for: true
  trusted_proxies:
    - 127.0.0.1
```

This issue will close automatically the next time the integration loads and sees the block.
